title: cleiostoma villosum
intro: Cleiostoma villosum, also known as the hairy cleiostoma, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India, China, and Southeast Asia. It belongs to the family Acanthaceae and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Cleiostoma villosum can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or by using them as a topical application to take advantage of its health benefits.
